summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Energy Optimization SaaS application. Backend APIs 96% successful (23/24), frontend fully functional with dev bypass login, complete user flows, and all integrations working.

integration_issues.issue: Returns 200 with Google OAuth page instead of 302 redirect
integration_issues.impact: Minor - endpoint is functional, just different response format than expected

passed_tests: Dev bypass login flow using /api/auth/dev-login with test credentials
Session persistence and auth/me endpoint verification
Fresh user onboarding wizard completion via API
Dashboard load with populated state showing KPIs, charts, and integration status
Bill PDF upload and review dialog save flow
Manual consumption entry single row and batch import (4 entries total)
Analytics run generating KPIs (110.4 kWh, €30.73), anomalies, advices, and forecast
Insights page timeline and advice cards rendering
Notifications center opens and mark all read functionality works
Reports page generate report and download link works (PDF 1062 bytes)
Pricing page renders Free/Pro plans and CTA dialogs
Settings page loads integrations, notification preferences working
Auth session persistence verified in browser after login
Google OAuth start endpoint reachable (returns Google OAuth page)
Weather integration status: ok
Price integration status: ok
Email dev-mode flow working correctly
All navigation flows (Dashboard, Bills, Consumption, Insights, Reports, Pricing, Settings)
Mobile responsiveness with mobile menu functionality
Frontend-backend API integration fully functional
Notifications system with 2 forecast alerts displayed
Landing page with professional design and Italian localization
